name: Superhero Look Alike Contest
author: Poki
description: Superhero Look Alike Contest is a dress up game where you try to look like your favorite superheroes. Are you the best superhero look alike? How to play Superhero Look Alike Contest? Click or tap on an object to pick it up and use it. Who created Superhero Look Alike Contest? Superhero Look Alike Contest is created by Idea Studio.
